title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) to Enter and Sign Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with Various Offices and Companies for the Enhancement of the Skills and Capability Through on - the - Job Training of the Students of Peso -caesar Los Baños Manpower Skills Training Center. (AUTHOR: HON. CRIS DAYRIL B. BAGNES, CO-AUTHOR: HON. MIKO C. PELEGRINA, 04/12/2021)
